raw_consumer_statement: I had XXXX charges from XXXX XXXX for XXXX each. My card was used to purchase XXXX digital sim cards. I immediately called Citi and disputed the fraudulent charges and got a new credit card. The charges were still being attempted even as the card was being canceled. Citi said that it was taken care of and I got my money back but now XXXX  months later they have reversed that decision because XXXX XXXX says that the product has been delivered to my physical address which is not possible since its a digital product. I did get an email containing access to the sims. I also immediately changed all of my passwords including email. I did not open or redeem the digital sim cards.
